body_txt: When seeking an attractive partner, this character likes 'em big, likes 'em chunky. Simply put, this character Has a Type , and that type is fat people. Sometimes, this is presented as an ordinary aesthetic preference. Plenty of people agree a Big Beautiful Man or Woman is appealing, and the Chubby Chaser simply finds them especially voluptuous or desirable. Some prefer the nickname "Fat Admirer" to emphasize that (even if they are not actively chasing ) they see beauty in big people. However, if being pudgy is assumed an unattractive flaw , then this character is presented unsympathetically, with their interest in a chubby partner ridiculed as bad taste. Their attraction may be explicitly a Fetish , with the implication that Fetishes Are Weird . A related fetish involves feeding their partner and taking pleasure in the resulting Intentional Weight Gain . These nicknames may be applied in a disapproving way, generally (and unfairly) only to a thin person in a relationship with a much thicker one, leaning on the assumption that this couple is mismatched in attractiveness. Compare Fat and Skinny , Ugly Guy, Hot Wife , Hot Guy, Ugly Wife . This is Truth in Television and possibly Older Than Dirt , with many cultures celebrating the full-figured Earth Mother as beautiful and sexy. The stigma against Hollywood Pudginess is relatively new . See an analysis of Big Beautiful Woman for more. A Chubby Chaser character may find Values Resonance when they discover art from ages past that suits their preferences, and might even lament that they were Born in the Wrong Century . Related to Big Beautiful Woman , Big Beautiful Man , Big Fun , and Fat and Proud . Compare Amazon Chaser if the Amazonian Beauty has Stout Strength . Overlaps with Beauty Is Relative if this trait treated as an individual or cultural standard of beauty.
